title: Suspicious PowerShell encoded command on FIN-WKS-08
description: EDR flagged a base64-encoded PowerShell one-liner spawning from Office. Possible initial access.

title: Multiple failed VPN logons then success — geo-improbable
description: 12 failed then 1 successful VPN auth for user j.doe from two countries within 5 minutes.

title: Ransomware note dropped on file server SRV-FS-02
description: Mass file rename with .lockbit extension and HOW_TO_DECRYPT.txt across three shares.
